SW-DC1-AR.details:
configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
SW-DC1-AR(config)#vlan 10
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#name VLAN_DATOS
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#exit
SW-DC1-AR(config)#vlan 20
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#name VLAN_VOZ
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#exit
SW-DC1-AR(config)#vlan 80
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#name VLAN_TEST
SW-DC1-AR(config-vlan)#exit
SW-DC1-AR(config)#end
SW-DC1-AR#
configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
SW-DC1-AR(config)#hostname SW-DC1-AR
SW-DC1-AR(config)#end
SW-DC1-AR#

--- show vlan brief ---


VLAN Name                             Status    Ports
---- -------------------------------- --------- -------------------------------
1    default                          active    Gi0/0, Gi0/1, Gi0/2, Gi0/3, Gi1/0, Gi1/1, Gi1/2, Gi1/3, Gi2/0, Gi2/1, Gi2/2, Gi2/3, Gi3/0, Gi3/1, Gi3/2, Gi3/3
10   VLAN_DATOS                       active    
20   VLAN_VOZ                         active    
50   VLAN_SEGURIDAD                   active    
80   VLAN_TEST                        active    
1002 fddi-default                     act/unsup 
1003 token-ring-default               act/unsup 
1004 fddinet-default                  act/unsup 
1005 trnet-default                    act/unsup
